title: Velvety Brazilian Runner Beans Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and umami-packed dish featuring tender runner beans that are both flavorful and soft.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil or butter
Optional: a pinch of red pepper flakes for extra heat

instructions: Heat the oil or butter in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the finely chopped onion and minced garlic. Sauté until fragrant but not browned.
Carefully add the runner beans to the pan. Stir-fry for about 5 minutes, ensuring they cook evenly without breaking down too much.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. If desired, sprinkle in a pinch of red pepper flakes.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
